# Google Forms Survey Design and Analysis Skill

This folder contains a Copilot Skill for survey design and analysis workflows.

## Why the main file is named SKILL.md

Copilot discovers skills by looking for a file named `SKILL.md` in a skill folder. If the file name is changed, the skill will not load.

## How to know what this skill does

Use these identifiers:

- Folder name: `google-forms-survey-design-analysis`
- Frontmatter name in SKILL.md: `google-forms-survey-design-analysis`
- Frontmatter description in SKILL.md: describes exact trigger/use cases

## What this skill is for

- Google Forms-first survey workflows
- Questionnaire design and response analysis
- Textual plus numerical summaries
- Optional visual recommendations
- English-first wording cleanup with safety guardrails

## Editing guidance

- Keep `SKILL.md` file name unchanged.
- You can freely edit the content inside `SKILL.md`.
- You can rename the folder and frontmatter `name` together if you want a different label.
